name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition

## Problem

<!-- What can't you do today, and why does that matter? -->

## Proposal

<!-- Concrete change. UI? Config flag? New backend? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem and why you ruled them out. -->

## Scope

<!-- Is this a small addition or a structural change? Are you willing to
     implement it yourself? -->
